## Summary

Split large builds across independent background agents by surface (iOS, web, backend), brief each agent with full terminology + member context up front, and…

## Description

Split large builds across independent background agents by surface (iOS, web, backend), brief each agent with full terminology + member context up front, and coordinate via system reminder notifications. Eliminates sequential bottlenecks on multi-surface work.
